settings.name: username
settings.label: Trakt username
settings.description: Use "me" with an access token, or a public Trakt username for public lists.

settings.name: syncWatchlist
settings.label: Sync watchlist
settings.description: Set to false to skip watchlist sync.

settings.name: syncWatched
settings.label: Sync watched history
settings.description: Set to false to skip watched-history sync.

settings.name: syncWatchedHistory
settings.label: Sync individual watched dates
settings.description: Set to false to only use Trakt's watched summary instead of individual play history.

secrets.name: accessToken
secrets.label: Trakt access token
secrets.description: OAuth access token. Required when username is me or when syncing private lists.
